title: EmergencyNotification
description: A Notify NYC emergency alert / advisory message (NotifyNYCMessage / EmergencyAlert). Canonical schema reconciling two live surfaces: the 'NYCEM Emergency Notifications' Open Data archive (8vv7-7wx3) and the real-time Notify NYC CAP (Common Alerting Protocol) RSS feed published on the rented Everbridge platform (feeds.everbridge.net/feeds/453003085617722/rss/rss.xml), which fans each message out across ~14 languages plus a per-message CAP XML enclosure.

notificationType.description: Notify NYC notification type ('NotificationType') — the severity/kind of alert.

title.description: Headline ('Notification Title' / CAP 'title'), e.g. 'Notify NYC - Risk of Rip Currents'.

language.description: Message language, from the CAP feed 'author' tag (e.g. 'NYCEM [Spanish]'). English is canonical; the feed republishes each alert in ~14 languages.

dateAndTime.description: When the notification was issued ('Date and Time' / CAP 'pubDate').

capUrl.description: Link to the per-message CAP XML document (CAP 'enclosure'/'link').

affectedBoroughs.description: Boroughs referenced by the alert, where scoped (e.g. 'BK/QN').
